mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, user_id, contents, parent_comment_id) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{contents}, #{parentCommentId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, post_id, user_id AS author_id, parent_comment_id FROM comments WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = now() WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
